character.name: Fire Emblem GBA style chibi
character.prompt:
Fire Emblem GBA style chibi battle mage girl, western fantasy,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions,
large head with big expressive eyes, short body, small hands and feet,
short fitted white and blue tunic dress with gold trim,
absolutely no cape, no cloak, no robe, no hood, no veil, no head covering,
long silver hair growing from full scalp, flowing past waist behind her,
hairline and forehead clearly visible above eyes,
face fully exposed showing eyes nose mouth,
wooden staff with large blue crystal orb held in right hand,
gold belt at waist, knee-high blue boots,
young woman early 20s, gentle pose,
clean pixel art, vibrant colors, sharp silhouette
